title: Section 28A
content: 1[28A. Term of copyright in works of public undertakings.--In the case of a work, where a public undertaking is the first owner of the copyright therein, copyright shall subsist until 2[sixty years] from the beginning of the calendar year next following the year in which the work is first published.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 23 of 1983, s. 11 (w.e.f. 9-8-1984). 2. Subs. by Act 13 of 1992, s. 2, for "fifty years" (w.e.f. 28-10-1991).
